title: CBDT Notifies Cost Inflation Index (CII) at 384 for FY 2026-27: What it Means for You
content:
# CBDT Notifies Cost Inflation Index (CII) at 384 for FY 2026-27: What it Means for You

Ek important update hai! The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne Financial Year 2026-27 ke liye Cost Inflation Index (CII) notify kar diya hai. This is crucial for calculating your long-term capital gains.

Here are the key details you need to know:

*   **New CII Value:** The Cost Inflation Index (CII) for the Financial Year 2026-27 has been set at **384**.
*   **Official Notification:** This update was issued via Notification No. 85/2026-Income Tax, dated July 15, 2026.
*   **Effective Date:** The new CII will be effective from April 1, 2026, and will apply to the tax year 2026-27 and subsequent tax years.
*   **Purpose of CII:** CII is used to adjust the cost of acquisition and improvement of capital assets for inflation. This helps in determining the long-term capital gains that are chargeable to tax, ensuring you are taxed on the real gain and not just the inflationary increase.
*   **Comparison with Previous Year:** For the preceding Financial Year 2025-26, the CII was 376. This marks an increase of approximately 2.13% for FY 2026-27. A higher CII generally leads to a higher indexed cost, which can help reduce your taxable capital gains.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Visit the Income Tax Department Website for Notifications](https://www.incometax.gov.in/)

*Published on: 16 July 2026*
